# init(rawValue:)

**Initializer**

Creates a new frame decode operation status with the raw value that you specify.

## Declaration

```swift
init(rawValue: UInt)
```

## Parameters

- **rawValue**: The `UInt` value to specify a frame decode operation status.
title: init(rawValue:)
